description: Sequence of distinct positive integers built as follows: for n = 1, 2, ..., if a(n) has not yet been determined, let b be the least base >= 2 such that the base-b expansion of n, when read backwards, corresponds to that of an integer, say r, not yet in the sequence and the base-b expansion of r, when read backwards, corresponds to that of n; then a(n) = r and a(r) = n.
